task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or web interface is visible, indicating successful access to the system.

task_completion.description: The template title is set to 'New Patient Welcome'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field designated for the template name or title contains the exact text 'New Patient Welcome'.

task_completion.description: The first half of the required template content is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main text area for the template body contains the phrases 'Welcome to Hillside Family Medicine' and 'We are honored that you have chosen us'.

task_completion.description: The second half of the required template content is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main text area for the template body contains the phrases 'dedicated to providing comprehensive, compassionate care' and 'access our patient portal'.

task_completion.description: The new document template is successfully saved in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Template saved successfully') is visible, or the 'New Patient Welcome' template is shown in a list/table of existing templates.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the NOSH ChartingSystem GUI rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the NOSH interface with standard mouse/keyboard interactions.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual NOSH application to create the template.
integrity.visual_evidence: The template creation occurs within the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface, not in a generic text editor (like Notepad, Gedit, or Nano).

integrity.description: Agent did not fake the success state using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open or being used to manipulate the DOM to show fake success messages or template lists.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a document template in NOSH ChartingSystem. The expected template title is exactly 'New Patient Welcome'. The template body must contain the following specific phrases: 'Welcome to Hillside Family Medicine', 'We are honored that you have chosen us', 'dedicated to providing comprehensive, compassionate care', and 'access our patient portal'.
